verifier_input.doc_snippet:
This study adopts the CRISP-DM framework to guide the data mining process, including data understanding, data preparation, modelling, evaluation, and deployment phases (Figure 1) .
A synthetic dataset consisting of 4500 undergraduate Computer Science student records from intake cohorts between 2021 and 2025 was generated based on institutional academic structures [19, 20]. The dataset includes demographic, academic performance, and progression-related attributes as shown in Table 1. The synthetic dataset distributions were designed based on institutional academic regulations and typical student progression patterns observed in undergraduate programmes.
